sizing_rule.note: Increase contracts after large loss when negative correlation expected (mean-reversion style). Exact multiplier undefined by author; treated as scaled-up ANTI_MARTINGALE variant. Vince typically uses Optimal f or Kelly but author silent on formula here.

source_rule_text: Increase position size (contracts) when negative correlation is expected after a large loss, as the next trade is likely to be a large win.
